text.tspan: local runtime first (free) → cloud gateway fallback (costly)
• PORTER_DATA_DIR — no hardcoded paths, hosts, or ports
• Missing dep = honest 'not ready' + install guide, never fake
• Agents, models, and local runtimes are all user-configured
• Trust-first UI: hide incomplete features, never present as working
set data dir · add file locations · set password
